## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy and workflow for Attention's SEO and content marketing engagement with GrowthX Labs.](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX will produce 10 articles/week, focusing on long-tail keywords and content templates to efficiently scale content](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
  - [Content strategy combines competitor research, keyword inventory, and Attention's ICP/persona information](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Workflow includes Notion docs, Airtable for tracking, Slack for communication, and Air-ops for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Attention to provide feedback on initial content, with GrowthX handling ongoing optimization and adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Overview

  - [Three-pronged approach: competitor research, keyword inventory, and content templates](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)
  - [Utilizes Attention's ICP and persona information to inform topic selection](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Aims for low-competition, long-tail keywords to build authority before targeting competitive terms](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [40 initial topics planned, covering various industries and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)

### Workflow and Tools

  - [Airtable used for assignment tracking, keyword mapping, and performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Notion for documentation and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Slack for communication](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Air-ops for content generation and workflow management](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Weekly updates on Google Search Console metrics in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)

### Content Production and Optimization

  - [10 new articles per week, starting immediately](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [5 content refreshes per week for existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [SEO Testing tool used to measure performance of refreshed content over 8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Custom illustrations and infographics available to enhance content visuals](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Website Optimization

  - [GrowthX to provide feedback on current blog template for SEO improvements](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Suggestion to include clickable author information for E-A-T optimization](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
  - [Additional CRO tactics shared, including exit-intent popups and sidebar widgets](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Attention to review content strategy document in Airtable and provide feedback on proposed topics](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
  - [GrowthX to analyze current blog template and provide SEO optimization suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Attention to send Figma file with current design building blocks for content visuals](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin producing first set of 10 articles, aiming for delivery by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
  - [Slack follow-up with all relevant links to be sent and pinned in project channel](https://fathom.video/share/9ucs14pZGC1-zMX1BWDvJwAcfGqP4xry?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
